economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Besikoh Fuel Limited Partnership, Nazko Economic Development Corp., Nazko Logging Limited Partnership, Nazko Silviculture LLP, Ndazkhot'en Forest Management Ltd., Ndazkhot'en Holdings Ltd., Ndazkhot'en Properties Ltd., Three Nations Store and Lodge Limited Liability Partnership. GBEs at 51%: Nazbec Limited Partnership, Nazbec Wood Processing Ltd.
notes: Prior year (2020) included a $6,295,884 forgiveness of Treaty loan as a one-time item which significantly inflated prior year revenue. Recovery from Indigenous Services Canada of $4,795 recorded separately below surplus line. Replacement Reserve is in technical default with CMHC with unfunded reserves of $8,046. Nine entities consolidated at 100% and two at 51% (Nazbec Limited Partnership and Nazbec Wood Processing Ltd.). Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness $3,784,151 + accounts payable $1,169,767 = $4,953,918. Long-term debt decreased significantly from $3,824,202 to $492,961 due to $3,331,241 repayment. Prior year auditor was a different CPA firm.
